channel.title: Wandering Wojo
channel.description: A travel journal. Southwest to Alaska. Wojo the cat and his co-pilot Van on the road.

item.title: The Precipice
item.description: Stevenson, WA — The adventure really begins tomorrow morning. It's been nice staying with family in The Gorge, buttoning up odds and ends, getting some laughs and hugs in.

item.title: Touching Base
item.description: White Salmon, WA — Started feeling a bit antsy in Central Oregon… Ready to get on the road but taking care of odds and ends, errands, paperwork, setting up the truck.

item.title: Beginning in Bend
item.description: Bend, Oregon — Been a month since leaving White Salmon, WA to set out on this adventure. Still calling Washington home for now, but really the road is going to be home.
